title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.380 - Noncommissioned officers — appointment, how made
text:
41.380.  Noncommissioned officers — appointment, how made. — Appointments to all grades above the lowest grade shall conform to the tables of organization.  All such appointments shall be made in accordance with the regulations governing the Armed Forces of the United States.
(L. 1951 p. 654 § 60)
